Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IBridgeTracer

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Optional tracer for Bridge method calls. Implement this interface to observe all RPC traffic for debugging, performance monitoring, or visualization.

public interface IBridgeTracer

Methods

OnExportCallEnd(string, string, long, string?)

Called when a JS→C# method invocation completes successfully.

void OnExportCallEnd(string serviceName, string methodName, long elapsedMs, string? resultType)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
elapsedMs long
resultType string

OnExportCallError(string, string, long, Exception)

Called when a JS→C# method invocation fails.

void OnExportCallError(string serviceName, string methodName, long elapsedMs, Exception error)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
elapsedMs long
error Exception

OnExportCallStart(string, string, string?)

Called when a JS→C# method invocation starts.

void OnExportCallStart(string serviceName, string methodName, string? paramsJson)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
paramsJson string

OnImportCallEnd(string, string, long)

Called when a C#→JS method invocation completes.

void OnImportCallEnd(string serviceName, string methodName, long elapsedMs)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
elapsedMs long

OnImportCallStart(string, string, string?)

Called when a C#→JS method invocation is sent.

void OnImportCallStart(string serviceName, string methodName, string? paramsJson)

Parameters

serviceName string
methodName string
paramsJson string

OnServiceExposed(string, int, bool)

Called when a service is exposed.

Parameters

serviceName string
methodCount int
isSourceGenerated bool

OnServiceRemoved(string)

Called when a service is removed.

serviceName string
